inline_comments.message:
We are required to use ONAP common base images for Guilin.
For CCSDK, we provide a common base image based on that ONAP
base (onap/integration-java11) so that we can standardize installation of common add-on packages

Please use common CCSDK alpine base image:
onap/ccsdk-odl-sodium-alpine-image:${ccsdk.docker.version}
ccsdk.docker.version should be set in pom.xml to 1.0-STAGING-latest
for now (will be changed to a released version before we do a release build)
Same comment as on other Dockerfile change - please use common CCSDK alpine base to ensure compliance with Guilin requirement to use standard ONAP base image.
